rules.name: path-auth
rules.message: Auth-related files changed. Review session handling, tokens, and redirect validation.

rules.name: path-payment
rules.message: Payment or billing files changed. Review charge, subscription, and webhook behavior.

rules.name: path-config
rules.message: Configuration-related files changed. Review environment and compatibility impact.

rules.name: path-database
rules.message: Database or schema files changed. Review migration and rollback behavior.

rules.name: path-workflow
rules.message: CI or workflow files changed. Review automation and release pipeline behavior.

rules.name: package-metadata
rules.message: Package metadata or lockfile changed. Review dependency and script behavior.

rules.name: file-deleted
rules.message: Files were deleted. Review whether the removal is intentional and covered by tests.

rules.name: large-change
rules.message: More than 10 files changed. Review scope and look for unrelated edits.
